title: Bunger [Cobblemon]
description: puts the funny burger guy into funny cube monster mod
body:
adds [bunger](https://breezewiki.com/bugsnax/wiki/Bunger) from [bugsnax](https://bugsnax.com/) into cobblemon

they mostly spawn in most places

all models made by me (poorly)

has a shiny form

drops bread n steak when slain

put it in both resource pack and datapack folders
